creator: marck@rinet.ru
text:
Slightly modified patch, for pkg-plist removal.
 
 Index: Makefile
 ===================================================================
 RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/misc/p5-List-Compare/Makefile,v
 retrieving revision 1.5
 diff -u -r1.5 Makefile
 --- Makefile	6 Sep 2008 16:02:29 -0000	1.5
 +++ Makefile	9 Jul 2009 08:05:55 -0000
 @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #
  
  PORTNAME=		List-Compare
 -PORTVERSION=		0.34
 +PORTVERSION=	0.37
  CATEGORIES=		misc perl5
  MASTER_SITES=		CPAN
  PKGNAMEPREFIX=		p5-
 @@ -16,6 +16,18 @@
  
  PERL_CONFIGURE=		yes
  
 +PLIST_FILES=	\
 +	${SITE_PERL_REL}/List/Compare.pm \
 +	${SITE_PERL_REL}/List/Compare/Base/_Auxiliary.pm \
 +	${SITE_PERL_REL}/List/Compare/Base/_Engine.pm \
 +	${SITE_PERL_REL}/List/Compare/Functional.pm \
 +	${SITE_PERL_REL}/${PERL_ARCH}/auto/List/Compare/.packlist
 +PLIST_DIRS+=	\
 +	${SITE_PERL_REL}/List/ \
 +	${SITE_PERL_REL}/List/Compare/ \
 +	${SITE_PERL_REL}/List/Compare/Base \
 +	${SITE_PERL_REL}/${PERL_ARCH}/auto/List/Compare
 +
  MAN3=			List::Compare.3 \
  			List::Compare::Base::_Auxiliary.3 \
  			List::Compare::Base::_Engine.3 \
 Index: distinfo
 ===================================================================
 RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/misc/p5-List-Compare/distinfo,v
 retrieving revision 1.5
 diff -u -r1.5 distinfo
 --- distinfo	6 Sep 2008 16:02:29 -0000	1.5
 +++ distinfo	9 Jul 2009 08:05:55 -0000
 @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 -MD5 (List-Compare-0.34.tar.gz) = bd8631a14bb3e1c96c8be6c509debfc2
 -SHA256 (List-Compare-0.34.tar.gz) = 0754a222ac31edb5b75dbeb3186ba8404042b2cd8acd4f9e661866be9534bc84
 -SIZE (List-Compare-0.34.tar.gz) = 191079
 +MD5 (List-Compare-0.37.tar.gz) = 7c730dd58cc31a5bbb8eb7006edd1704
 +SHA256 (List-Compare-0.37.tar.gz) = e9bf84498fc5697b7aef12c9e0bacd054f5c5359120395ad84ae5ec10a325713
 +SIZE (List-Compare-0.37.tar.gz) = 83106
 Index: pkg-plist
 ===================================================================
 RCS file: pkg-plist
 diff -N pkg-plist
 --- pkg-plist	22 Jan 2006 02:28:42 -0000	1.2
 +++ /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
 @@ -1,10 +0,0 @@
 -%%SITE_PERL%%/List/Compare.pm
 -%%SITE_PERL%%/List/Compare/Base/_Auxiliary.pm
 -%%SITE_PERL%%/List/Compare/Base/_Engine.pm
 -%%SITE_PERL%%/List/Compare/Functional.pm
 -%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/List/Compare/.packlist
 -@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/List/Compare
 -@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/List
 -@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/List/Compare/Base
 -@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/List/Compare
 -@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/List
 
 
 
 -- 
 Sincerely,
 D.Marck                                     [DM5020, MCK-RIPE, DM3-RIPN]
 [ FreeBSD committer:                                 marck@FreeBSD.org ]
